emails.subject: Re: CA Data Sheets
emails.body: Re: CA Data Sheets Hi Gerald: ENA has 2 executed agreements with a Colonial Pipeline Company in Atlanta, GA re 1) our possible provision of risk management, energy advisory and facility outsourcing services and 2) our possible provision of energy management services. The more recent one (3/10/2000 for risk management, energy advisory . ) is our form. Neither contain any unusual restrictive provisions. Kay Gerald Nemec 04/10/2000 01:37 PM

emails.subject: Re: CA Data Sheets
emails.body: Re: CA Data Sheets Gerald: Sorry for the delay on these. I thought I had responded, but don't find a "Sent mail". We have nothing relating to Horizon. There is an executed agreement with Merrill Lynch re financing for Trailblazer Pipeline Company, but nothing with Trailblazer. I'll put the datasheet in your box. Let me know if you need to see the agreement. KaY Gerald Nemec 04/13/2000 04:04 PM
